ml_results.why_best: RandomForestClassifier was selected on churn-aware validation: churn_recall=0.5333, ahead of LogisticRegression by +0.0000. Weighted F1=0.1149, macro F1=0.3109.
ml_results.preprocessing_notes: Categorical features are imputed and one-hot encoded inside train-fold preprocessing. Numeric features are median-imputed; linear/SVM/KNN models also receive scaling. Identifier columns are removed before this stage. Class imbalance ratio was 8.31; class_weight + train-fold resampling.

evaluation_results.recommendation: Model recall for churn customers is low (53%). Consider threshold optimization or stronger imbalance handling.

report_results.executive_summary: InsightForge analyzed Titanic.csv with 891 rows and 10 columns. The workflow identified a classification task and selected RandomForestClassifier as the strongest model. Churn recall was 0.5333; weighted F1 was 0.1149. Data quality scored 92.62/100 after automated cleaning.
